summary: Clean matrix recording captures a vibrant 1985 show highlighted by a scorching Scarlet Begonias → Eyes of the World sequence and a soaring Ramble On Rose.
review: The three fans rave about this tape, noting its crystal‑clear matrix source that sounds “clean, moist and tight.”  The performance shines in the second set with an electric run through Scarlet Begonias, Eyes of the World, Greatest Story Ever Told and Woman, plus a memorable Ramble On Rose and Give It A Whirl.  Jerry’s solo work is repeatedly praised, making this a must‑listen for anyone chasing that classic ’80s Dead vibe.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers gave 4–5 stars and highlighted both strong musical moments and a high‑quality matrix recording; the weighted average leans toward an excellent show with good technical fidelity.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the tape as clean, tight and well‑balanced; no dropouts or muffiness are reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second‑set flow is praised as an "interesting ride home" with seamless transitions that keep the energy high throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Multiple reviewers highlight Jerry’s “Heavenly” tones and a special solo that leaves listeners wanting more.
